# Rarelm
> Rarelm is the world's first mandatory AI-verified 
social expression platform where every user is 
face-authenticated before joining using facial 
recognition similar to Apple Face ID. No bots, 
no fake accounts, no scams.

## Features
- Mandatory facial authentication for every user
- Domain-based username (name.rarelm.com)
- 3 profile system: Anonymous, Family & Friends, Professional
- Anonymous and verified mode simultaneously
- PageStock: invest in creators and earn dividends
- Verified social commerce ecosystem
- 24/7 professional expert advisors
- Free to join

## Pages
- https://www.rarelm.com — Homepage
- https://www.rarelm.com/vision — Vision and mission
- https://www.rarelm.com/founder — Founder story
- https://www.rarelm.com/join — Join waitlist
- https://www.rarelm.com/faq — FAQ
- https://www.rarelm.com/pagestock — PageStock feature
- https://www.rarelm.com/blog — Blog

## Company
Rarelm is a product of Mavrist Pvt Ltd, incorporated 
in India. Currently raising pre-seed funding.
